description_long: This is a modern, boxy residential house surrounded by a landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a neutral color palette dominated by light gray and white tones. There is a driveway with a car parked in front, and a fenced backyard area that includes a small circular structure, possibly a gazebo or shed. The property is enclosed by a dark fence, and the landscaping is neatly arranged with a mix of tall and short trees. The main entrance is visible at the front, with a clear pathway leading to the door. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by landscaped trees, a driveway, and a fenced yard. The design is minimalist and contemporary with a neutral color palette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, and several trees symmetrically arranged around the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, green lawn, and a circular gazebo or shed structure among the trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, circular gazebo, and dense tree arrangement behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the back of the house, fenced yard, and a clear view of the flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a direct pathway, no porch or columns, minimal overhang
